personality: Compassionate, solemn, quietly fervent. Speaks with measured piety and genuine concern for souls.

greetingPool.text: Peace be upon you, child. The chapel doors are always open to the weary.
The Lord watches over all who walk the road in faith. How may I counsel you?
Come, rest your spirit here. The world beyond these walls is full of trials.

idlePool.text: The vespers bell will ring soon. There is comfort in the rhythm of prayer, day after day.
I must copy these psalms before the ink fades. The old manuscripts grow more fragile each year.
